Y-chromosome / X-inactivation genes with strong sex-of-donor bias. Empirical signature in this dataset: KDM5D and DDX3Y are 10.3% / 7.7% in 0041326 vs ~0% in 0041323 — donor-sex differs between samples. Exclude from cell-type scoring, PCA/scVI input, and any cross-sample comparison; retain in obs as a sex-confirmation tag only.
